title: Shikārpur Heat Wave
lead: Shikārpur is experiencing an extreme heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Shikārpur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 46%, and the wind speed is 9.7 km/h, contributing to the severe heat. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to persist, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) forecasted, resulting in significant discomfort and health risks.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
